headline: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About Cadence (CDNS): Should You Buy?
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in Cadence (CDNS). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?
